name: unified-platform-poc
description: Angular Native Federation POC — Angular 21 shell + Angular 21 remote + Angular 19 web-component remote

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --prefix packages/loan-bridge && npm run build --prefix packages/design-tokens
scripts.build:all: npm run build:packages && npm run build --prefix mfe1 && npm run build --prefix mfe2 && npm run build --prefix shell
scripts.start: npm run start:mfe1 & npm run start:mfe2 & npm run start:shell & wait
